brand_voice: Warm, reassuring, upbeat, and practical. Little Shop of Happiness helps shoppers choose thoughtful gift hampers and gift boxes without making the decision feel bigger than it needs to be. Copy should sound like a helpful gift-savvy friend: emotionally aware, specific about the gifting moment, and practical enough to help the shopper choose quickly.
tone_direction: Lead with the shopper's gifting problem or occasion, then make the choice feel simple. Use Australian spelling and avoid unsupported urgency, guarantees, free-shipping claims, stock claims, or generic luxury language.
usp: Australia-wide gift hamper delivery, same-day delivery within 30km of Perth, handwritten personal messages, and build-your-own gift box options.

se_ranking.notes: Google Australia project engine confirmed from live SE Ranking chart/listKeywords reads.

folder_check.notes: Root folder and direct child folders were listed through the Google Drive connector. SEO Reports and Benchmarks child folders remain pending in the Markdown brief. Two 04 Keyword Research folders exist; keep both IDs until filing is cleaned up.

website.canonical_note: Use https://www.littleshopofhappiness.com.au for crawls and reports; legacy littleboxofhappiness.com.au redirects to the primary domain.

collection_discovery.summary: 215 discovered collection URLs; 28 non-empty candidates from cached discovery. Priority sidecar seeded with 16 commercially important live collection pages.
